entry.note: <L>423<pc>3,1<k1>akz<k2>akz<e>1 <s>akz</s> ¦ (perhaps a kind of old <ab>Desid.</ab> of √ <hom>1.</hom> <s>aS</s>) <ab>cl.</ab> 1. 5. <s>akzati</s>, <s>akzRoti</s> (<ls>Pāṇ. iii, 1, 75</ls>; <ab>fut.</ab> <s>akzizyati</s> or <s>akzyati</s>, <ls>L.</ls>; <ab>aor.</ab> <s>AkzIt</s>, 3. <ab>du.</ab> <s>AkzizwAm</s> or <s>AzwAm</s>, <ls>L.</ls>; <ab>perf.</ab> <s>Anakza</s> [<ls>Pāṇ. vii, 4, 60</ls> <ab>Comm.</ab>], but <ab>Ā.</ab> <ab>p.</ab> [with the Vedic weak stem <s>Akz</s> <ab>cf.</ab> <ab>perf.</ab> <s>AS-uH</s> 3. <ab>pl.</ab> &c. <ab>fr.</ab> √ <hom>1.</hom> <s>aS</s>] <s>AkzARa/</s>), <div n="to"/>to reach, <ls>RV. x, 22, 11</ls>; <div n="to"/>to pass through, penetrate, pervade, embrace, <ls>L.</ls>; <div n="to"/>to accumulate (to form the cube?), <ls>L.</ls> : <div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>akzayati</s>, <s>Acikzat</s>, to cause to pervade, <ls>L.</ls> : <div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> <s>acikzizati</s> or <s>acikzati</s>, <ls>L.</ls><info whitneyroots="akz1,1;akz2,1"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="1,5"/><listinfo n="sup"/> <LEND>

<L>165<pc>1-0013<k1>akz<k2>akz {#akz#}¦, {#a/kzati#} und {#akzRo/ti#} <ls>P. 3,1,75.</ls> <ls>VOP. 8,74.</ls> {#Anakza#} <ls>P. 7,4,60</ls>, <is>Vārtt</is>. 1. {#akzitA#} und {#azwA; akzizyati#} und {#akzyati; AkzIt, AkzizwAm#} oder {#AzwAm#} <ls>VOP. 8,75.</ls> {#akzitvA#} oder {#azwvA; azwa#} . <div n="1"> 1) {%erreichen, treffen%}: {#ma\kzU tA ta^ indra dA\nApna^sa AkzA\Re#} (<ab>d. i.</ab> {#AnAkzARe) SU^ra vajrivaH . yadDa\ SuzRa^sya da\mBayo^ jA\taM viSva^M sa\yAva^BiH ..#} <ls>ṚV. 10,22,11.</ls> <div n="1">— 2) {%durchdringen, erfüllen%} ({#vyAptO#}) <ls>DHĀTUP.</ls> <ls>NAIGH. 2,18.</ls> ({#A\kzA\RaH#}). <div n="1">— 3) {%anhäufen%} ({#saMGAte#}) <ls>DHĀTUP.</ls> — Caus. {#akzayati, Acikzat#} . — Desid. {#acikzizati#} und {#acikzati#} . <div n="v">— Vgl. {#aS#} . <div n="p">— {#nis#} {%zerstreuen, aus einander jagen%}: {#i\mami^ndra varDaya kza\triya^M ma i\maM vi\SAme^kavf\zaM kf^Ru\ tvam . nira\mitrA^~ akzRuhyasya\ sarvA\~stAnra^nDayAsmA ahamu\ttarezu^ ..#} <ls>AV. 4,22,1.</ls> <div n="p">— {#sam#} {%durchgehen, durchwandern%}: {#tvaM devi brahmalokaM samakzase#} (Med.) <ls>R. 2,52,80.</ls> <LEND>
<L>222077<pc>7-384-1b<k1>akz<k2>akz √{#akz#}¦ I. {#akzRute, akzRuyAt#} und {#akzita/#} in der <ab>Bed.</ab> {%verschneiden%} <ls>MAITR. S. 4,2,9 (32,8. fgg.)</ls>.<info n="sup_7"/> <LEND>
